subject: Zarude V, the Rogue Monkey Pokemon — Dark/Grass-type creature leaping aggressively through jungle vegetation
description: A dark simian creature fills most of the frame, captured mid-leap through dense green jungle. The figure has a dark body with visible vine-like appendages and prominent white eyes with red pupils giving an intense, menacing expression. Green foliage blurs past in the background suggesting rapid motion. The card has a V-frame dark border and holofoil treatment. The composition is a close mid-shot emphasizing the creature's power and forward momentum.
foreground: dark simian creature lunging forward with vines, intense expression
